title: Mattel Hot Wheels Felt Mega Mat with Toy Car Kids Road Playset Playroom Rug
description:

A fantastic playroom essential for boys where miles of fun and imagination await, the Hot Wheels Felt Mega Mat creates an awesome space for kids to play with toy cars and car accessories. Mattel Hot Wheels Felt Mega Mat with Toy Car Kids Road Playset Playroom Rug

Rev those engines and drive onto the action-packed, high-speed, thrilling world of Hot Wheels on this full-color deluxe Mega Mat!

A fantastic playroom essential for boys where miles of fun and imagination await, the Hot Wheels Felt Mega Mat creates an awesome space for kids to play with toy cars and car accessories. Made from durable felt and measuring 30 x 27 inches, the mega mat is soft and comfortable for little ones to kneel on, and makes it easy for them to maneuver toy cars across the mat, as they race from the gas station to City Hall and everywhere in between!

Key Features

  • HOT WHEELS MEGA MAT CARS PLAYSET: The Hot Wheels Felt Mega Mat creates an awesome space for kids to play with toy cars and car accessories, miles of fun and imagination await! Made from felt, the mega mat is soft and comfortable for little ones to kneel on and makes it easy for them to maneuver toy cars across the mat while also protecting floor surfaces
  • PLAY ROOM ESSENTIALS FOR BOYS: Measuring 30 x 27 inches, the Hot Wheels diecast cars mega mat is a play room essentials item! And, when the mega mat is not in use, it easily folds or rolls up and can tuck away for neat and tidy storage
  • AWESOME FOR PRETEND PLAY WITH CARS: If you know little kids who love to play with cars, construction toys and other toy trucks and vehicles, this Hot Wheels mega mat is a must have! Kids will love using their imagination to conjure up lots of pretend play scenarios, while developing their fine motor skills
  • HOT WHEELS PLAYSET INCLUDES: This awesome Hot Wheels kids playset includes x1 Hot Wheels diecast car, x1 large felt Mega Mat and x4 car accessories; the felt mat is easy to spot clean with soap and warm water
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 27.5 x 30.5 x 0.01 inches; Weight: 1.15lbs; Color: Multi; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: MATHWMEGAM1
  • UPC: 686141174260
  • Color: Orange
  • Size: Large

If you know little kids who love to play with cars, construction toys, and other toy trucks and vehicles, this Hot Wheels mega mat is a must-have. Kids will love using their imagination to conjure up lots of pretend play scenarios while developing their fine motor skills. Plus, the mat can be used with all kinds of other toys and toy vehicles.

HOT WHEELS PLAYSET INCLUDES: This awesome Hot Wheels kids’ playset includes x1 Hot Wheels diecast car, x1 large felt Mega Mat, and x4 car accessories. The felt mat is easy to spot clean with soap and warm water and, when the mega mat is not in use, it easily folds or rolls up and can tuck away for neat and tidy storage.

Let the games begin!

Recommended Ages: 3+
